title: Lesson 292: 過ぎる, 過ぎる, 好く...

items.gloss: to pass through; to pass by; to go beyond; to pass (of time); to elapse; to have expired; to have ended; to be over; to exceed; to surpass; to be above; to be no more than ...; to be excessive; to be too much; to be too ...
to go by; to cross; to pass by; to flash across
to like; to love; to be fond of
to be transparent; to leave a gap
to comb (out); to card; to untangle (hair)
to make something (e.g. paper) from wet, pulpy material by spreading it thin and drying it
to plough; to plow; to hoe; to till
